fields.label: Render Mode
fields.help: auto = try static first, fall back to browser if page needs JS.

fields.label: Keep Nav/Header/Footer
fields.help: Keep navigation, header, and footer content (usually boilerplate).

fields.label: Max Tokens
fields.help: Truncate markdown to ~N tokens. 0 = no limit.

fields.label: Wait For Selector
fields.help: CSS selector to wait for before extracting (browser mode only).
